Challenges in Autonomous Driving Development

20
						December

2024

Within the scope of Winter Technology Talks'24, organized in cooperation with Engineering and Natural Science Faculty, OPINA and UTAS, the challenges faced in autonomous driving development with the presentation of AVL Turkey Research and Engineering representative Tahir Eren Mungan was concluded.

📅 Date: Wednesday, December 18, 2024

📍 Location: Ramazan Nejat Tuncay Conference Hall, Okan University
